title: Junior Revenue Manager at Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies!
